name: team-task-manager
description: Full-stack Team Task Manager with role-based access (Admin/Member). Express + Prisma + Postgres + React.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.build: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
